task:
Create a single Thunderbird draft (do NOT send) with these exact fields:

- To (three recipients): qa@launchco.example, devops@launchco.example, marketing@launchco.example
- CC: program-manager@launchco.example
- Subject: Launch Readiness Review - Cross Team Sign Off
- Body:
  Hi all,

  Please review the launch readiness checklist attached to the shared drive. Each of your teams owns one section:

  - QA: regression suite, crash reporting, rollback plan
  - DevOps: production capacity, on-call schedule, feature flags
  - Marketing: press embargo timing, social media drafts, partner emails

  We will hold the go/no-go decision Friday at 10:00 AM in the main war room. Please flag any blockers by Thursday end of day.

  Thanks.
